nasb.text: And Joshua cast lots for them in Shiloh before the Lord, and there Joshua divided the land to the sons of Israel according to their divisions.

esv.text: and Joshua cast lots for them in Shiloh before the Lord. And there Joshua apportioned the land to the people of Israel, to each his portion.

cnv.text: 約書亞就在示羅，在耶和華面前為他們抽籤；約書亞在那裡按著他們的支派把地分給以色列人。

ccb.text: 约书亚便在示罗按照以色列的支派，在耶和华面前为他们抽签分地。
